explanation: The user asks to get a pot and wash it. First, I pick up the pot (using pot_0 as the new object since no discussed objects exist). I then place it in the sinkbasin to wash it. To wash it, I turn the faucet on and off. After washing, I pick up the pot again and place it back on the countertop. This sequence ensures the pot is obtained, cleaned, and returned to a safe location.
